title: Pan-Asia Equities Reporter - Singapore
description:
Bloomberg News is one of the biggest financial and business news organizations in the world. We lead the way in breaking news and providing analysis on financial markets, from real-time coverage to in-depth features. Known for our accuracy, speed, and insight, we deliver journalism investors can act on, and that commitment drives us to keep innovating.

We are seeking an experienced and motivated reporter to join our Asia equities team, based in Singapore. From a boom in artificial intelligence stocks to the rising influences of retail investors, this role offers a front-row seat to the forces reshaping Asia's equity markets.

You will work closely with a team of expert reporters and editors in Singapore and across the region, covering the daily ebb and flows of Asian markets while helping explain their global significance to Bloomberg’s worldwide audience.

The role involves breaking news, writing sharp real-time analysis, and producing ambitious step-back features. You will also develop and maintain strong relationships with key market participants, including leading fund managers focused on Asian assets, and regularly publish interviews with influential voices in the region.

We’ll trust you to:

  • Break news and write insightful stories analyzing market trends on a deadline
  • Build and maintain a strong source base across the region from traders to money managers
  • Monitor stock and index moves and explain the drivers behind them
  • Mine the Bloomberg terminal for smart and actionable data-driven stories
  • Participate in live coverage of events such as central-bank decisions and earnings, highlighting the stock-market impact
  • Collaborate closely with colleagues on the Equities Team globally and other members across Asia Markets colleagues
  • Engage audiences through multimedia storytelling and discussions on Bloomberg’s digital platforms
  • Serve as deputy team leader for pan-Asia stories, coordinating with the South Asia equities team leader to ensure timely, comprehensive coverage of major Asia regional market trends
  • Bring creativity and innovation to story framing, writing, and presentation

You need to have:

  • At least 7 years of recent financial journalism experience
  • At least 3 years of experience working in a real-time breaking news environment
  • Experience covering Equities market as a reporter or equivalent experience at Bloomberg
  • Proven ability to make and build sources in financial markets
  • A track record of team work and collaboration
  • An ability to write quickly, clearly and accurately under tight deadline pressure
  • A bachelor’s degree or equivalent work experience
  • Demonstrated continuous career growth within an organization
  • Fluency in both written and spoken English

Life at Bloomberg is many things, but it’s never dull. We’re a truly global business with a truly diverse workforce. We pride ourselves on being open, inclusive and collaborative, and provide a work environment that inspires our employees to be their best. We offer competitive compensation, comprehensive healthcare coverage, and programs to support you and your family through different life stages, from parental leave to generous retirement savings plans.

If this sounds like you:

Apply if you think we're a good match. We'll get in touch to let you know what the next steps are, but in the meantime feel free to have a look at this: www.bloomberg.com/professional

Learn more about our office and benefits:

Singapore | www.bloomberg.com/professionalwww.bloomberg.com/singapore

postedCompany.description:
Born in 1981, Bloomberg is the world's primary distributor of financial data and a top news provider of the 21st century. A global information and technology company, we use our dynamic network of data, ideas and analysis to solve difficult problems. Our customers around the world rely on us to deliver accurate, real-time business and market information that helps them make important financial decisions.

At Bloomberg, we are guided by four core values that are the foundation of our continued success: innovation, collaboration, customer service and doing the right thing.

We harness the power of data and analytics to organize, understand and improve our world. It's our purpose. Come find yours.
postedCompany.name: BLOOMBERG SINGAPORE PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
